g.text: [FHIR R4] POST /HealthcareService (relevant for the BgZ use-case)
Step 1: Create BgZ Workflow Task at sending party
- input=[FHIR query parameters per BgZ dataset]

- extension for selected healthcareservice (for routing purposes): Extension.where(url='http://nuts-foundation.github.io/nl-generic-functions-ig/StructureDefinition/task-stu3-healthcareservice').value.as(Reference)
Step 2: Locate notification endpoint of receiving party
[FHIR R4] GET required endpoint connected to this HealthcareService, i.e. through HealthcareService.endpoint
Step 3: Send Notified Pull task to receiving party
Find OAuth endpoint tied to the receiver
Get access token for sending party
Step 4: Locate BgZ Server endpoint of sending party
Step 5: Receiving party pulls BgZ Workflow Task
Find OAuth endpoint tied to that Organization (Endpoint.payloadType = Nuts-OAuth)
Get access token for sending party
Step 6: Receiving party pulls BgZ dataset
[For each BgZ FHIR query in Task.input]
Step 7: Receiving party routes to the right location
The receiving organization has to show that the hand-off/referral comes to the right location/part
of the organisation instead of a general or organization-wide list/inbox.
